chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD M.A.No.17 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of C.MA-2078/2019. 12.10.2020. Mr.Ahsan Gul Dahri, Advocate for applicant/surety. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. *.-*-.*-.*-.*-.*-.*-.*-.*-.*-.* The applicant by way of listed application has sought for issuance of direction against learned trial Court to release / disburse the amount to the legal heirs of the deceased as per their respective shares. 2. On being asked when the very appeal was dismissed as not pressed, then how the direction sought for by way of listed application could be issued by this Court? 3. In response to above, it was stated by the learned counsel for the applicant that such direction would meet the ends of justice. 4. The appeal which is dismissed as not pressed could not be revived only to issue the direction sought for by the applicant. Consequently, the listed application being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E Ahmed/Pa,
